items.label: Nonfarm Payrolls
items.headline: Nonfarm Payrolls reached 10M in June 2026, a gain of 9K jobs versus May 2026.

items.label: Unemployment Rate
items.headline: Unemployment Rate moved to 4.7% in June 2026, down 0.1 points versus May 2026.

items.label: Labor Force
items.headline: Labor Force reached 11.1M in June 2026, a loss of 5.6K versus May 2026.

items.label: Employment Level
items.headline: Employment Level reached 10.6M in June 2026, a gain of 1.3K versus May 2026.

items.label: Information Employment
items.headline: Information Employment reached 150.1K in June 2026, a gain of 1.1K jobs versus May 2026.

items.label: Professional & Business Services Employment
items.headline: Professional & Business Services Employment reached 1.6M in June 2026, a loss of 4.6K jobs versus May 2026.

items.label: Construction Employment
items.headline: Construction Employment reached 654.8K in June 2026, a loss of 1.1K jobs versus May 2026.

items.label: Professional & Business Services
items.headline: Professional & Business Services reached 1.6M in June 2026, a loss of 4.6K jobs versus May 2026.
